75334.subject:
[GitHub] A third-party OAuth application has been added to your
 account
75334.body:
Hey NovosadovO!

A third-party OAuth application (Pipedream) with admin:org_hook, admin:repo_hook, gist, notifications, project, read:org, read:user, repo, and write:discussion scopes was recently authorized to access your account.
Visit https://github.com/settings/connections/applications/84c85b30bc294c9cf468 for more information.

To see this and other security events for your account, visit https://github.com/settings/security-log

If you run into problems, please contact support by visiting https://github.com/contact

Thanks,
The GitHub Team

75333.subject: рџ”ґ The Insider: At 250, is AmericaвЂ™s democracy in good health?
75333.body:
The Economist
 

 
 


 
  
  вЂЊ вЂЊ вЂЊ вЂЊ вЂЊ вЂЊ вЂЊ вЂЊ вЂЊ вЂЊ  вЂЊ вЂЊ  вЂЊ вЂЊ вЂЊ вЂЊ вЂЊ вЂЊ вЂЊ вЂЊ вЂЊ вЂЊ  вЂЊ вЂЊ   вЂЊ вЂЊ вЂЊ вЂЊ вЂЊ вЂЊ вЂЊ вЂЊ вЂЊ вЂЊ  вЂЊ вЂЊ   вЂЊ вЂЊ вЂЊ вЂЊ вЂЊ вЂЊ вЂЊ вЂЊ вЂЊ вЂЊ  вЂЊ вЂЊ  вЂЊ вЂЊ вЂЊ  вЂЊ вЂЊ  вЂЊ вЂЊ вЂЊ вЂЊ вЂЊ вЂЊ вЂЊ вЂЊ вЂЊ вЂЊ  вЂЊ вЂЊ   вЂЊ вЂЊ вЂЊ вЂЊ вЂЊ вЂЊ вЂЊ вЂЊ вЂЊ вЂЊ  вЂЊ вЂЊ   вЂЊ вЂЊ вЂЊ вЂЊ вЂЊ вЂЊ вЂЊ вЂЊ вЂЊ вЂЊ  вЂЊ вЂЊ вЂЊ вЂЊ вЂЊ вЂЊ вЂЊ вЂЊ вЂЊ вЂЊ  вЂЊ вЂЊ   вЂЊ вЂЊ вЂЊ вЂЊ вЂЊ вЂЊ вЂЊ вЂЊ вЂЊ вЂЊ  вЂЊ вЂЊ   вЂЊ вЂЊ вЂЊ вЂЊ вЂЊ вЂЊ вЂЊ вЂЊ вЂЊ вЂЊ  вЂЊ вЂЊ

 At 250, is America’s democracy in good health?


 Zanny Minton Beddoes

Editor-in-chief


 Thirty-seven years ago when I first moved to America for graduate school, I bought a copy of the Declaration of Independence in a battered wooden frame at a yard sale. Ever since, it has hung wherever I have lived, a reminder of the country in which I have spent most of my adult life, of which my husba

75332.subject: The latest AI news we announced in June 2026
75332.body:
The Monthly AI Recap

РђРІС‚РѕСЂ: Google


РђРІС‚РѕСЂ: Google

    
    
    РџСЂРѕС‡РёС‚Р°Р№С‚Рµ С†СЋ СЃС‚Р°С‚С‚СЋ РЅР° LinkedIn, С‰РѕР± РїСЂРёС”РґРЅР°С‚РёСЃСЏ РґРѕ РѕР±РіРѕРІРѕСЂРµРЅРЅСЏ
РџСЂРѕС‡РёС‚Р°С‚Рё РЅР° LinkedIn
https://www.linkedin.com/comm/pulse/latest-ai-news-we-announced-june-2026-google-zjdmc?lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_email_series_follow_newsletter_02%3BrqowmAqGTx%2B1d61rq6KsDA%3D%3D&midToken=AQFTjFOONAfT2w&midSig=1a7bOGbsyirck1&trk=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_&trkEmail=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_-null-fz96fz~mr2hcst7~nx-null-null&eid=fz96fz-mr2hcst7-nx
  
This month was about creating a more unified environment where AI delivers help naturally throughout your day. With the debut of Android 17 and local models like Gemma 4 12B running right on your laptop, our June updates reflect a vision where technology acts as an intuitive partner and helps you reach your goals. Whether youвЂ™re a small business owner trying to get your shop noticed, a student setting up a study schedule or a researcher tackling climate challenges, these updates handle the complex logistics so you can focus on what matters most. Try Gemma 4 12B, our latest open model. Gemma 4 12B brings smart AI agents directly to your laptop. It runs locally using just 16GB of memory, combining a novel unified architecture with vision and native voice processing in a single streamlined system. This gives you advanced reasoning and private workflows on everyday hardware without sacrificing speed. Experience computer use in Gemini 3.5 Flash. We integrated computer use into Gemini 3.5 Flash, allowing you to build custom agents that can see, reason and take action across desktop, mobile and browser environments. The update improves performance for long-horizon and enterprise automation tasks, like continuous software testing and knowledge work. Start building with Nano Banana 2 Lite and Gemini Omni Flash. To make it faster and easier to experiment, refine and scale your ideas, we've launched two major updates. First, Nano Banana 2 Lite is now available and itвЂ™s our fastest and most cost-efficient Gemini Image model yet. Second, we're bringing Gemini Omni Flash to APIs in public preview, introducing a natively multimodal model for enterprises and developers to build custom, dynamic video workflows for the very first time. Check out what's new in Android 17. Android 17 is packed with features like floating app windows for faster multitasking, Screen Reactions for picture-in-picture recording, an optimized layout for foldable gaming and more. YouвЂ™ll also get more peace of mind with new security upgrades, including the ability to lock a missing phone using your biometrics. These updates are rolling out first to Pixel devices, followed by other eligible Android devices throughout 2026. Plus, take a look at our new personalization and safety features in JuneвЂ™s Android Drop. Discover the June Pixel Drop. We rolled out new features and Gemini upgrades designed to ma

75331.subject: рџ”· The Daily: Robinhood Chain goes live
75331.body:
Venice AI raises $65M | Standard Chartered sees MORPHO at $60 | Ethereum Institutional launches with Joe Lubin backing | Trump-backed American Bitcoin sets 1-for-15 reverse stock split |

The Daily ( https://www.theblock.co/?utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=theblocknewsletters )

Written by Daniel Kuhn | Edited by Jason Shubnell

Presented by

BitGo ( https://www.bitgo.com/?utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=theblocknewsletters )

Happy Wednesday! *Bitcoin* is up over 2% to $60,200 as most crypto prices turn green. The top 10 tokens by market cap are all up on the day, except *HYPE* , which is still up 151% year-to-date.

In today's newsletter, *Robinhood Chain* debuts alongside a slate of crypto integrations, *Venice AI* raises $65 million, *Standard Chartered* says *MORPHO* could run to $60, *Ethereum Institutional* nonprofit launches with backing from Joe Lubin, and more.

Meanwhile, Trump-backed American Bitcoin sets a 1-for-15 reverse stock split ( https://www.theblock.co/post/406941/trump-backed-american-bitcoin-1-for-15-reverse-stock-split-maintain-nasdaq-listing?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=theblocknewsletters ) in a bid to maintain its Nasdaq listing.

*P.S.* Don't forget to check out The Funding , a biweekly rundown of crypto VC trends. It's a great read вЂ” and just like The Daily , it's free to subscribe ( https://www.theblock.co/newsletters?select=The%20Funding&utm_campaign=website&utm_campaign=website&utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_medium=referral&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=newsletter&utm_source=newsletter&utm_source=newsletter&utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=theblocknewsletters ) !

*THE BIG ONE*

*рџ•ЇпёЏ Robinhood Chain goes live on mainnet alongside 24/7 tokenized stocks, Lighter perps and planned crypto agentic trading*

( https://www.theblock.co/post/406918/robinhood-chain-goes-live-mainnet-alongside-24-7-tokenized-stocks-lighter-perps-planned-crypto-agentic-trading?utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=theblocknewsletters )

Robinhood Chain, an Ethereum Layer 2 built on Arbitrum, officially launched on public mainnet with day-one partners including Uniswap for liquidity, Pleiades for prop trading, plus integrations with Alchemy, BitGo, and Chainlink, according to a major announcement from the firm.

* Eligible users in 120+ countries can now trade 24/7 Stock Tokens on-chain via Robinhood Wallet; these tokenized debt securities provide economic exposure to stocks/ETFs and are usable in DeFi lending/collateral (unavailable in the U.S. and certain regions).
* A revamped Robinhood Wallet also added access to perpetual futures via the Ethereum-based Lighter DEX in selected jurisdictions, with $11 million in LIT tokens committed for community rewards and bonus points for Robinhood users.
* The companyвЂ™s global expansion announced Wednesday includes official launch in Canad
